next_steps: Bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) with direct fluorescent antibody and molecular testing for parasites, fungi, and viruses
ACTH stimulation test to rule out adrenal insufficiency
Peripheral blood smear for hematologic markers of infection or microangiopathic processes
CT abdomen/pelvis with contrast to evaluate the nature of the bowel obstruction and search for occult collections
Review of the recent medication list and adherence to PCP prophylaxis
